headline: Is Broadridge (BR) Quietly Rewriting Its Core Market-Plumbing Role With Agentic AI And Cyber Moves?
summary: In recent days, Broadridge Financial Solutions and its affiliates announced a series of technology-focused moves, including a collaboration with Fispoke to embed securities-based lending into advisor workflows, new agentic AI features on LTX’s BondGPT trading platform, and participation in Anthropic’s Project Glasswing to enhance cybersecurity for critical financial infrastructure. Taken together, these initiatives reinforce Broadridge’s role at the core of market plumbing while extending...
